notes: Grounded mapping candidates for MVP v1 candidate sample set.
Only families with relatively stable operational meaning are mapped in v0.1.
Absence of mapping is a valid and intentional state.
This file must not be used to fabricate references for unmatched or weakly matched cases.
mapping_policy_notes: Pattern family match does not automatically imply mapping readiness.
If no grounded mapping exists for the matched family and object class, emit missing_mapping rather than a guessed reference.
Owner hints are suggestions only and do not replace human assignment.
Mappings may exist at family level first and later evolve into object-level mappings.

mappings.related_kb_title: Investigating watchdog timeouts in orchestrated nightly jobs
mappings.follow_up_hint: Check whether the job is a known recurring workload, confirm run duration trend, and review recent dependency latency before escalating.
mappings.reviewer_note_template: Confirm whether the timeout matches a known recurring pattern or whether the job family or cause chain has changed.

mappings.related_kb_title: Reference file missing at expected path during intake
mappings.follow_up_hint: Validate whether the expected file path is correct, confirm supplier handoff status, and check whether the file is missing versus inaccessible.
mappings.reviewer_note_template: Confirm whether this is a genuine file-missing event or an access, handoff, or environment-specific issue.
do_not_apply_if_contains_any: do not apply prod file-missing playbook

intentional_missing_mappings.reason: Family currently spans stable recurring-looking, context-poor, staging-specific, and replay semantic-drift cases. Mapping is intentionally deferred until subfamilies are separated.
intentional_missing_mappings.recommended_behavior: Allow family match, but keep mapping readiness false and route to review_needed unless a later subfamily rule becomes stable enough for grounded mapping.

intentional_missing_mappings.reason: Not every timeout-family match is safely mappable. New-job, no-baseline, or diverged-cause cases should remain reviewable even if the family matches.
intentional_missing_mappings.recommended_behavior: Use mapping only for canonical orchestrator timeout wording without escalation phrases. Otherwise emit missing_mapping or review_needed.

intentional_missing_mappings.reason: Not every file-missing surface form is a true missing-file event. Access-control, delayed handoff, or environment-specific ambiguity should not inherit a confident mapping.
intentional_missing_mappings.recommended_behavior: Use mapping only for canonical missing-at-path wording without conflicting-signal phrases. Otherwise emit missing_mapping or review_needed.
